msk.cluster.brokerlogs.CfnAbout: You can configure your Amazon MSK cluster to send broker logs to different destination types. This configuration specifies the details of these destinations.

msk.cluster.brokerlogs.CloudWatchLogs.Description: Details of the CloudWatch Logs destination for broker logs.

msk.cluster.brokerlogs.Firehose.Description: Details of the Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream that is the destination for broker logs.

msk.cluster.brokerlogs.S3.Description: Details of the Amazon MSK destination for broker logs.
